description: Constraint templates for evaluative interface - L0/L1/L2 three-level constraint system

L0.name: Hard Constraint
L0.description: One-vote veto, action is denied when triggered

L1.name: Soft Constraint
L1.description: Significant penalty, action may be executed but will affect score

L2.name: Preference
L2.description: Minor penalty, LLM should avoid but not enforced

templates.name: Low health forbids dangerous actions
templates.description: When health is below 20%, forbid approaching hostile entities or attacking

templates.name: Explosive entity nearby requires retreat
templates.description: When creeper is within 5 blocks, must flee

templates.name: Forbidden to enter lava area
templates.description: When lava is within 3 blocks, forbid moving forward

templates.name: Forbidden to enter void
templates.description: When Y coordinate is below 5, forbid any movement

templates.name: Forbidden to mine air
templates.description: Cannot mine air or empty target

templates.name: Tool required but not equipped
templates.description: Mining ore requires corresponding tool level

templates.name: Low hunger forbids intense work
templates.description: When hunger is below 30%, forbid sprinting and attacking

templates.name: Inventory nearly full forbids gathering
templates.description: When inventory usage exceeds 90%, restrict gathering actions

templates.name: Night exploration without weapon forbidden
templates.description: At night without weapon, forbid exploration
templates.reason: Night exploration without protection is dangerous

templates.name: Crafting without crafting table forbidden
templates.description: Crafting needed but no crafting table nearby

templates.name: Smelting without furnace forbidden
templates.description: Smelting needed but no furnace nearby

templates.name: Avoid unnecessary grass breaking
templates.description: Avoid destroying grass blocks without clear purpose

templates.name: Long distance movement should use pathfinding
templates.description: When moving distance exceeds 10 blocks, recommend pathfinding
templates.reason: Long distance movement should use pathfinding
